creator: takamune@avrl.mei.co.jp
text:
Please apply this patch to upgrade ports (of which I'm the maintainer).

Changes:
  - Updates japanese/ndtpd for the latest version ja-ndtpd-2.3.4(patched).
  - Updates japanese/eb for the latest version ja-eb-2.3.4.
  - These ports should be simultaneously upgraded.
  - japanese/eb/Makefile
	o Fix breakage of extraction appendix files.
	  <http://bento.freebsd.org/errorlogs/3-full/ja-eb-2.3.3.log>
  - No files have been added or removed.
